full_content:
1 | """
   2 | context/evidence.py
   3 | 
   4 | Evidence lifecycle for phased analysis.
   5 | 
   6 | Raw tool observations are facts collected during a phase. EvidenceLedger turns
   7 | those observations into structured records, phase summaries, and compact prompt
   8 | references so completed phases no longer need to carry raw tool output forever.
   9 | """
  10 | 
  11 | from __future__ import annotations
  12 | 
  13 | import hashlib
  14 | import json
  15 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  16 | from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
  17 | 
  18 | from context.token_budget import estimate_tokens
  19 | 
  20 | if TYPE_CHECKING:
  21 |     from llm.base import LLMBackend
  22 | 
  23 | 
  24 | @dataclass
  25 | class EvidenceRecord:
  26 |     """Structured evidence extracted from one successful tool observation."""
  27 | 
  28 |     evidence_id: str
  29 |     phase: str
  30 |     tool_name: str
  31 |     path: str = ""
  32 |     range_text: str = ""
  33 |     summary: str = ""
  34 |     artifact_id: str = ""
  35 |     token_count: int = 0
  36 |     key_evidence: bool = False
  37 | 
  38 |     def to_dict(self) -> dict:
  39 |         return {
  40 |             "evidence_id": self.evidence_id,
  41 |             "phase": self.phase,
  42 |             "tool_name": self.tool_name,
  43 |             "path": self.path,
  44 |             "range_text": self.range_text,
  45 |             "summary": self.summary,
  46 |             "artifact_id": self.artifact_id,
  47 |             "token_count": self.token_count,
  48 |             "key_evidence": self.key_evidence,
  49 |         }
  50 | 
  51 |     def reference_text(self) -> str:
  52 |         """Compact prompt-safe reference for completed phase evidence."""
  53 |         location = self.path or "(no path)"
  54 |         if self.range_text:
  55 |             location = f"{location} {self.range_text}"
  56 |         artifact = f" artifact={self.artifact_id}" if self.artifact_id else ""
  57 |         return (
  58 |             f"[Evidence {self.evidence_id} | phase={self.phase} | "
  59 |             f"tool={self.tool_name} | {location} | ~{self.token_count} tokens{artifact}]\n"
  60 |             f"{self.summary}"
  61 |         )
  62 | 
  63 | 
  64 | @dataclass
  65 | class Claim:
  66 |     claim_id: str
  67 |     text: str
  68 |     status: str
  69 |     evidence_ids: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  70 |     confidence: float = 0.0
  71 |     source_paths: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  72 | 
  73 |     def to_dict(self) -> dict:
  74 |         return {
  75 |             "claim_id": self.claim_id,
  76 |             "text": self.text,
  77 |             "status": self.status,
  78 |             "evidence_ids": list(self.evidence_ids),
  79 |             "confidence": self.confidence,
  80 |             "source_paths": list(self.source_paths),
  81 |         }
  82 | 
  83 |     def prompt_text(self) -> str:
  84 |         evidence = " ".join(f"[{evidence_id}]" for evidence_id in self.evidence_ids) or "[no-evidence]"
  85 |         return f"- {self.status} [{self.claim_id}] {evidence}: {self.text}"
  86 | 
  87 | 
  88 | @dataclass
  89 | class PhaseSummary:
  90 |     """Summary of evidence collected during one analysis phase."""
  91 | 
  92 |     phase: str
  93 |     evidence_ids: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  94 |     files: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  95 |     claims: list[Claim] = field(default_factory=list)
  96 |     confirmed_facts: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  97 |     open_gaps: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  98 |     artifact_ids: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  99 |     confidence_boundaries: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 100 |     recommended_verification_reads: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
